description_en: Nagoya may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 9 halal restaurants and 1 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Nagoya, Japan, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Nagoya: 9+ halal restaurants, 1 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
